phaseLabel.ladyOfTheLake: 湖中女神 (Lady of the Lake)

connection.disconnected: 已斷線，請檢查網路連線 (Disconnected — check your connection)

spectator.bannerTitle: 👁 觀戰模式 — 角色已隱藏 (Spectating — roles hidden)
spectator.hintVoting: 👁 觀戰中 — 等待玩家投票...
spectator.hintQuest: 👁 觀戰中 — 任務隊伍正在行動...
spectator.hintLady: 👁 觀戰中 — 湖中女神查看中...
spectator.hintDiscussion: 👁 觀戰中 — 刺客正在選擇目標...

action.leaderTurn: 👑 輪到你了！請選擇任務隊伍 (Your turn — select a quest team)
action.voteTurn: 🗳️ 輪到你投票！贊成或拒絕此隊伍 (Your turn to vote — approve or reject)
action.questTurn: ⚔️ 你在任務隊伍中！請投票成功或失敗 (You are on the quest — vote success or fail)
action.ladyTurn: 🔮 你持有湖中女神！選擇一位玩家查看陣營 (You hold the Lady — inspect a player)
action.assassinTurn: 🗡️ 你是刺客！選擇目標刺殺梅林 (You are the Assassin — choose your target)

scoresheet.title: 牌譜
scoresheet.collapsedSummary: {{quests}} 輪任務・{{votes}} 次投票・點擊展開

suspicionBoard.hint: 點擊循環切換狀態 — 僅你自己可見 (Click to cycle status — visible to you only)

voteAnalysis.title: 📊 投票行為分析 (Vote Analysis)
voteAnalysis.matrixTitle: 投票矩陣 (每列 = 玩家，每欄 = 一次提案)
voteAnalysis.matrixLegend: ✓ = 提案通過 · ✗ = 提案否決 · 黃框 = 該輪隊長 · 👍 = 贊成 · 👎 = 反對

voteReveal.roundProposal: 第 {{round}} 關 — 第 {{attempt}} 次提案
voteReveal.title: 投票結果 (Vote Results)

lady.title: 🔮 湖中女神 (Lady of the Lake)
lady.pass: 湖中女神將傳遞給此玩家... (The Lady passes to this player...)
lady.pickTitle: 選擇一位玩家查看其陣營 (Choose a player to inspect their team alignment)
lady.waitingDesc: <holder>{{name}}</holder> 正在使用湖中女神查看一位玩家的陣營...
lady.waitingNote: (The Lady holder is inspecting a player's team alignment...)
lady.declareKeepPrivate: 不宣告=保持私密 (No declaration = keep it private)

assassin.questHistoryHeader: 任務隊伍歷史 (Quest Team History)
assassin.title: 🗡️ 刺殺梅林 (Assassinate Merlin)
assassin.prompt: 你認為誰是梅林？選擇你的目標 (Who do you think is Merlin? Choose your target)
assassin.goodWonIntro: 好人贏得了 3 次任務！(Good team won 3 quests!)
assassin.pickingTarget: 刺客正在選擇目標，試圖找出梅林... (The Assassin is choosing a target, trying to find Merlin...)
assassin.warning: 若刺客成功刺殺梅林，邪惡方獲勝！(If the Assassin kills Merlin, Evil wins!)

ended.reasonFailedQuests: 💀 邪惡方破壞了 3 次任務
ended.reasonVoteRejections: 🚫 5 次提案全數否決,邪惡方自動獲勝

votePanel.title: 隊伍提案投票 (Team Vote)
votePanel.subtitle: 同意或拒絕此次任務隊伍 (Approve or Reject the proposed team)
votePanel.allVoted: 所有人已投票！計算結果中…
votePanel.shortcuts: 快捷鍵 (Shortcuts)：<approve>Y</approve> 贊成・<reject>N</reject> 拒絕

questPanel.title: ⚔️ 任務投票 (Quest Vote)
questPanel.subtitle: 選擇讓此次任務成功或失敗 (Choose to succeed or fail this quest)
questPanel.notInTeamWaiting: 投票結果將在所有人提交後揭曉… (Results revealed when all votes are in…)
questPanel.submitted: ✓ 已提交，等待其他隊員投票…
questPanel.goodSideHint: 好人陣營：只能投成功 (Good side can only vote success)・快捷鍵 <key>S</key>
questPanel.evilSideHint: 快捷鍵 (Shortcuts)：<success>S</success> 成功・<fail>F</fail> 失敗

teamSelect.waitingDesc: 隊長 <leader>{{name}}</leader> 正在選擇任務隊員...
teamSelect.title: 👑 選擇任務隊伍 (Select Quest Team)
teamSelect.subtitle: 你是隊長，請選擇 {{count}} 名隊員執行任務。(You are the Leader — select {{count}} team members for the quest.)
teamSelect.teamComplete: 隊伍已選完！點擊確認進行投票。(Team complete! Click confirm to vote.)
teamSelect.moreNeeded_one: 還需選擇 {{count}} 名隊員 ({{count}} more member needed)
teamSelect.moreNeeded_other: 還需選擇 {{count}} 名隊員 ({{count}} more members needed)
teamSelect.youAreLeaderBanner: 👑 你是本輪隊長 (YOU ARE THE LEADER)
teamSelect.youAreLeaderInstruction: 請在時間內挑出 {{count}} 名隊員執行任務，逾時系統會自動代選。
teamSelect.timeoutWarning: ⚠ 剩下 {{seconds}} 秒，請盡快選隊！
teamSelect.autoSelectHint: 逾時未選 → 系統自動代選隊員進入投票
teamSelect.leaderChangedHint: 上次組隊被否決，換人組隊。
